headline: Global Payments (GPN) Gets Market Perform Rating from BMO Capital
summary: Global Payments Inc. (NYSE:GPN) is one of the 10 Best Fintech Stocks to Invest In According to Billionaires. On April 20, BMO Capital initiated coverage on Global Payments Inc. (NYSE:GPN), giving the stock a Market Perform rating and setting the price target at $76. The research firm noted that Global Payments Inc. (NYSE:GPN) has reshaped […]
